subcodes.first_line: O thou favored maidservant of God! Thy letter was received . Thou has expressed joy on account of thy visit to the friends in Chicago.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Greatest Name, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
